name: Squeaky Clean Credit Consulting
description_short: Squeaky Clean Credit Consulting disputes inaccurate items on credit reports and provides personalized credit counseling and monitoring to help clients rebuild their credit.
description_long:
Squeaky Clean Credit Consulting is a credit repair company offering personalized dispute services, credit counseling, and monitoring solutions. The company positions itself as distinct from competitors by emphasizing customized, hands-on approach rather than cookie-cutter letter templates. According to their website, they target consumers preparing for major financial milestones like homeownership, auto loans, or apartment rentals, as well as those recovering from credit damage.

The company's core service is credit repair through disputing inaccurate, outdated, or unverifiable negative items directly with credit bureaus and creditors. They supplement this with credit counseling for debt management and financial planning, plus integrated three-bureau credit monitoring powered by their partner MyFreeScoreNow. Their stated process involves three steps: audit and review of credit reports, custom dispute letter submission with coaching on building positive accounts, and ongoing monitoring with monthly updates.

Squeaky Clean distinguishes itself through several claims: custom dispute letters targeting both bureaus and creditors (not generic templates), unlimited disputes each cycle without waiting periods, and integrated three-bureau monitoring rather than single-bureau apps. They advertise a 45-day results timeline and currently offer 20% off credit repair services. The website features client testimonials claiming credit score increases of 100-150 points within 90 days to six months.

Key limitations exist in the available information: specific pricing is not disclosed on the website, no details about their dispute success rates or actual removal percentages are provided, and claims about 45-90 day results lack third-party verification. The website also contains a reference to a Webflow template studio that appears to be unrelated template marketing content, raising minor questions about site maintenance. Consumers should verify their specific situation with the company before committing.

In the broader ecosystem of credit repair services, consumers have multiple paths to improving their credit. Professional credit repair companies can dispute inaccurate items with all three bureaus, while credit monitoring services provide ongoing alerts about changes to your reports. For those building credit from scratch, secured credit cards and credit builder loans offer structured approaches. Consumers dealing with overwhelming debt may benefit from debt consolidation loans to simplify payments, or credit counseling through nonprofit agencies for personalized budgeting guidance. Consumers who successfully repair their credit often find better rates on installment loans, secured credit cards, and other financial products.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Custom-drafted dispute letters tailored to individual credit reports rather than generic templates
Unlimited disputes each cycle with no waiting periods between rounds
Integrated three-bureau credit monitoring (not limited to single-bureau tools)
One-on-one credit counseling guidance included for long-term financial strategy
Free credit audit available to potential clients
24/7 secure client portal access for real-time progress tracking
Targets both bureaus and creditors in dispute strategy for broader impact
cons: No specific pricing disclosed on website; clients must call or contact for cost information
Testimonial-based claims of 100-150 point increases in 45-90 days lack independent verification
No publicly available data on actual dispute success rates or removal percentages
Website contains unrelated Webflow template marketing content suggesting possible maintenance issues
Results timeline guarantees (45 days) may not be realistic for all consumers or dispute scenarios
best_for: Consumers with collections, charge-offs, or late payments preparing for home purchase or mortgage approval
Renters and apartment applicants needing credit improvement for rental approval
Individuals seeking personalized guidance beyond automated dispute services to rebuild credit long-term
Borrowers working toward auto financing or business funding who need immediate credit score improvement
diagnosis: Squeaky Clean Credit Consulting is best for credit-damaged consumers seeking personalized dispute assistance combined with financial coaching, particularly those targeting home purchase, apartment rental, or auto financing within 3-6 months. Primary caveat: claims of rapid 45-90 day results should be verified during the free audit, as dispute timelines depend heavily on creditor response rates and dispute complexity, which vary significantly by consumer.
services: Credit repair through bureau and creditor disputes
Removal of inaccurate, outdated, or unverifiable negative items
Personalized credit counseling and one-on-one guidance
Three-bureau credit monitoring with real-time alerts
Monthly credit reports and progress updates
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 12724 Gran Bay Pkwy Ste 410, Jacksonville, FL 32258
